name: @quoin/vocab-ark
description: Ark UI-flavoured primitives — number input, color picker, segment bar, toggle group.

attribution.harvestNotes: Ark UI publishes state-machine-driven primitives via @zag-js. This pack extracts the semantic shape (the element + ARIA story) of distinctive Ark widgets and renders them as Quoin primitives. Behaviour is delegated to host JS at runtime.
